basic_info.title: Castlevania: Symphony of the Night
basic_info.review: A masterpiece of the genre that redefined what a Castlevania game could be, offering deep RPG elements and a vast, interconnected world to explore.

alternative_names: Akumajō Dracula X: Getsu no Yasōkyoku

play_today.details: The most accessible modern version with original voice acting intact. Includes both SotN and Rondo of Blood in one package.

recommended_patches.name: Original Voice Acting
recommended_patches.description: Preserves the iconic PS1 voice lines including 'WHAT IS A MAN?!'

play_today.details: PC emulation offers the most flexibility with save states, speed control, and modding support. Best experience with PCSX2 or similar PS1 emulators.

recommended_patches.name: SotN Reborn Mod
recommended_patches.description: Comprehensive visual overhaul improving textures and models while preserving original art style

recommended_patches.name: 60 FPS Patch
recommended_patches.description: Unlocks frame rate for smoother gameplay on modern systems

recommended_patches.name: Control Enhancement Mod
recommended_patches.description: Improves input responsiveness and adds controller customization

optimal_settings: 60 FPS emulation
CRT filter for authentic feel
Enable save states
Touch controls customization
Save state slots enabled

play_today.details: Official mobile ports with touch controls. Convenient for portable play but uses newer voice dub that lacks original PS1 charm.

The definitive modern experience via Castlevania Requiem. Based on the PSP version, it offers native 1080p resolution, widescreen support, and the enhanced content including the new 'Dracula's Castle' dungeon and voice acting. Features modern conveniences like cloud saves, quick resume, and controller support. While some purists prefer the PS1's original soundtrack, the PS4 version provides the most accessible and feature-rich way to play today.

The original 1997 release remains the gold standard for purists seeking the authentic experience. It features the original, highly-regarded English voice acting and soundtrack that many fans prefer over later rearrangements. While it lacks widescreen support and modern QoL features, it offers the most faithful representation of the game's original design. Best played via emulation on modern hardware to overcome hardware limitations.

recommended_patches.name: Castlevania: Symphony of the Night - Improvement Hack
recommended_patches.description: A comprehensive patch for the PlayStation version that fixes the infamous 'Lucca's Gun' glitch, restores censored content, and improves overall game stability.

recommended_patches.name: SOTN Widescreen Patch
recommended_patches.description: Enables widescreen aspect ratio support for the original PlayStation version, allowing for a modern viewing experience on 16:9 displays.

recommended_patches.name: HardType & Quality Hack
recommended_patches.description: A pre-patched ISO for the PlayStation version that includes quality of life improvements and difficulty adjustments for a smoother playthrough.

optimal_settings: Enable widescreen patch support in the patch settings
Set internal resolution to 2x or 3x for sharp retro visuals
Enable texture filtering (bilinear) for smoother sprite scaling
Configure save states to auto-save every 5 minutes
Enable widescreen patch support
Set internal resolution to 2x for optimal performance
Enable controller support for on-screen or Bluetooth controllers
Use 'NTSC' video mode for correct timing and color accuracy

play_today.details: The PSP version (Dracula X Chronicles) offers a portable experience with enhanced content, including the new dungeon and voice acting. While it lacks the graphical fidelity of the PS4 version, it provides a convenient way to play on the go. The PSP version is also the basis for the PS4 port, making it a solid choice for those who prefer handheld gaming. However, it suffers from some graphical downgrades compared to the original PS1 version.

optimal_settings: Enable widescreen rendering for 16:9 aspect ratio
Set internal resolution to 2x or 3x for enhanced clarity
Enable texture filtering for smoother graphics
Configure save states to auto-save every 5 minutes
Enable widescreen rendering for 16:9 aspect ratio
Set internal resolution to 2x for optimal performance
Enable controller support for on-screen or Bluetooth controllers
Use 'NTSC' video mode for correct timing and color accuracy

description.synopsis: Set in 1476, the game follows Alucard, the half-vampire son of Dracula, as he investigates the sudden reappearance of his father's castle. Upon entering, he discovers that Dracula has been resurrected by a mysterious cult. Alucard must navigate the castle's dark corridors, defeat his father's minions, and ultimately confront the source of the resurrection to prevent another apocalypse.
key_features: Non-linear exploration with interconnected map design
Character progression via stat allocation and equipment upgrades
Ability to transform into various creatures (bat, wolf, mist, etc.)
Extensive inventory management with hundreds of items
Boss rush mode and hidden challenge rooms
Dynamic music system that changes based on location and time
Secret areas requiring specific items or abilities to access
Multiple endings based on player performance and choices
legacy_and_impact: Symphony of the Night is widely credited with popularizing the 'Metroidvania' genre, a term derived from its fusion of Metroid's exploration and Castlevania's action. Its influence is seen in countless modern titles that prioritize non-linear level design and character progression.
